hero.title: NyayaSetu
hero.subtitle: Integrated DBT & Grievance System for Social Justice
hero.description: A unified platform for Direct Benefit Transfer and Grievance Redressal, ensuring effective implementation of PCR Act and PoA Act. Technology-driven, transparent, and accessible for all citizens.

about.title: About Us
about.description: NyayaSetu is a dedicated platform built to ensure the efficient implementation and seamless delivery of benefits under two key legislations.

pcrAct.title: PCR Act, 1955
pcrAct.subtitle: Protection of Civil Rights Act
pcrAct.description: The Protection of Civil Rights Act, 1955 aims to abolish untouchability and ensure equal civil rights for all citizens.

poaAct.title: PoA Act, 1989
poaAct.subtitle: Prevention of Atrocities Act
poaAct.description: Prevention of Atrocities Act, 1989 aims to prevent atrocities and ensure justice for Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes.

features.title: Key Features
features.description: NyayaSetu is a comprehensive platform designed for effective implementation of the PCR Act and PoA Act.

secure.title: Secure & Transparent
secure.description: End-to-end encryption and blockchain-ready architecture for maximum security and transparency in all transactions.

multiRole.title: Multi-Role Support
multiRole.description: Designed for citizens, district authorities, social welfare departments, and financial institutions.

realTime.title: Real-time Processing
realTime.description: Instant verification, tracking, and disbursement with real-time notifications and updates.

applicationSubmission.title: Application Submission
applicationSubmission.description: Submit new applications under the PCR Act and PoA Act through a fast, secure, and hassle-free process.

applicationTracking.title: Application Tracking
applicationTracking.description: Effortlessly track your application's real-time status with complete transparency, ensuring you stay informed at every step.

documentVerification.title: Document Verification
documentVerification.description: Upload and verify your documents seamlessly through DigiLocker, ensuring a secure and hassle-free process.

fundDisbursement.title: Fund Disbursement
fundDisbursement.description: Receive funds directly in your bank account, ensuring a fast, transparent, and highly secure disbursement process.

grievanceRedressal.title: Grievance Redressal
grievanceRedressal.description: Easily register your grievances and receive prompt redressal with dedicated 24×7 support to assist you at every step.

supportServices.title: Support Services
supportServices.description: Access support through chatbot, helpline, and email, with multilingual assistance to ensure smooth communication.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.description: Reach out to us through various channels. We are here to assist you.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to the most common questions here.

questions.question: What is NyayaSetu?
questions.answer: NyayaSetu is a comprehensive platform designed for effective implementation of the PCR Act and PoA Act. It provides an integrated solution for Direct Benefit Transfer and Grievance System.

questions.question: How to apply?
questions.answer: To apply, first log in using Aadhaar OTP, then upload the required documents and submit your application. The entire process is online.

questions.question: How to check application status?
questions.answer: To check your application status, log in to the dashboard and go to the "Application Status" section. There you can see the real-time status of all your applications.

questions.question: What documents are required?
questions.answer: Required documents include caste certificate, bank passbook, Aadhaar card, and other relevant documents. All documents can be uploaded via DigiLocker.

questions.question: How to register a complaint?
questions.answer: To register a complaint, go to the "Help & Support" section and click on "Register Grievance". Your complaint will be resolved within 24-48 hours.
